mood: quiet atomic chimes on a shallow reflective field
lighting: soft museum overhead wash with a restrained red side-glow caught in seams, glints, and translucent surface repairs
object_inventory: irregular porcelain-bowl nodes with ripple halos
two hero-scale translucent membrane planes embedded as luminous edge cuts
hairline source seams and perimeter notches
small graphite counterweights and tile-like glints
negative_constraints: no legible words or alphanumeric marks inside the image
no dashboard, browser chrome, software UI, source-summary cards, desks, shelves, cabinets, or archive wall
no literal room photograph or explanatory installation poster
no crowded grid; preserve 65 to 80 percent open field
no repeated source URL, repeated article, or duplicated image source
no visible labels, filenames, taxonomy, or callouts
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
